violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of pink residue. Surfaces cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
The wall behind the syrup containers and area under front prep line were observed with an accumulation of food debris/residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and ice was voluntarily disposed of. Establishment to increase frequency of cleaning. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

Various food were observed held at 43-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was recently placed in unit. Service call was placed at the time of inspection and will be arriving later today. Unit to be stocked with half portions until unit is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

The prep unit was observed to unable to maintain food temperatures at 41 degrees. Unit was able to reach 41.7 degrees after being shut for 6 minutes. Service call was placed at the time of inspection. Unit to be stocked with half portions until unit is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023
